about.title: About Me
about.bio1: Hi, I'm {name}, a 4th-year Computer Science student at Maejo University.
about.bio2: I'm passionate about Full Stack Web Development and AI Model Training. I love learning new technologies and applying them to real projects.
about.fullstackDesc: Building web applications from Frontend to Backend with Vue.js, Nuxt, ASP.NET, and Express.js.
about.aiDesc: Interested in training AI models and applying Machine Learning to solve real problems with Python.
about.uiuxDesc: Designing UI/UX with Figma, focusing on great user experiences and beautiful interfaces.
about.devopsDesc: Using Docker, Git, Swagger, and Postman in development and deployment workflows.
about.ctaDesc: I'm always ready to learn and create amazing things.
